raw_consumer_statement: Duplicate charge on my Citiback Card XX/XX/year>. Made a putchase for a gift on XXXX for a XXXX annual subscription whicj I have done for many years for a family member. XXXX reps are giving me the runaround saying the refund has been issued and Citibank is reporting they havent heard from the merchant. The amount is for {$140.00}. I reported to XXXX XXXX hours after making the purchase that there is a duplicate charge. They said that it would be removed. When I received my Citiback statement 30 days later in was not removed and I was charged twice. There is an open dispute with Citibank. I have not received any comment from Citiback other than they havent heard back from the merchant ( XXXX )
